category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and split-system air conditioners exported from China to Pakistan

title.en: China-to-Pakistan Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入巴基斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入巴基斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Pakistan's PSQCA PS Mark mandatory certification framework, NEECA mandatory energy labelling and minimum energy performance standards (MEPS), PTA radio and EMC obligations, and ODS refrigerant phase-down requirements administered by the Ministry of Climate Change.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与巴基斯坦PSQCA PS Mark强制认证框架、NEECA强制能效标识及最低能效标准（MEPS）、PTA无线电和电磁兼容义务，以及气候变化部主管的消耗臭氧物质（ODS）制冷剂削减要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與巴基斯坦PSQCA PS Mark強制認證框架、NEECA強制能效標識及最低能效標準（MEPS）、PTA無線電和電磁相容義務，以及氣候變化部主管的消耗臭氧物質（ODS）制冷劑削減要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body decision, PSQCA filing, NEECA labelling approval, PTA type-approval, customs determination, installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current PSQCA mandatory product lists, PS Mark routes, NEECA energy label categories and MEPS values, PTA type-approval scope, refrigerant import conditions, and applicable voltage or grid requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation in Pakistan.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、符合性评定机构决定、PSQCA申报、NEECA标签批准、PTA型式认可、海关裁定、安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在巴基斯坦出货、销售或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行PSQCA强制产品清单、PS Mark路径、NEECA能效标签类别和MEPS数值、PTA型式认可范围、制冷剂进口条件及适用电压或电网要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、符合性評定機構決定、PSQCA申報、NEECA標籤批准、PTA型式認可、海關裁定、安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在巴基斯坦出貨、銷售或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行PSQCA強制產品清單、PS Mark路徑、NEECA能效標籤類別和MEPS數值、PTA型式認可範圍、制冷劑進口條件及適用電壓或電網要求。

answer_first.en: PSQCA mandatory PS Mark pre-market approval, NEECA mandatory energy label (1-5 stars) and minimum energy efficiency standards, PTA obligations for wireless-enabled units, and ODS refrigerant phase-down requirements are the major Pakistan compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps. China CCC is not recognised by Pakistan; fresh PSQCA pre-market approval is required before customs clearance.
answer_first.zh: PSQCA强制PS Mark上市前审批、NEECA强制能效标识（1-5星）及最低能效标准、适用无线功能机型的PTA义务，以及ODS制冷剂削减要求，是中国空气源热泵进入巴基斯坦的主要合规差距。巴基斯坦不认可中国CCC认证；须在清关前取得全新的PSQCA上市前审批。
answer_first.zht: PSQCA強制PS Mark上市前審批、NEECA強制能效標識（1-5星）及最低能效標準、適用無線功能機型的PTA義務，以及ODS制冷劑削減要求，是中國空氣源熱泵進入巴基斯坦的主要合規差距。巴基斯坦不認可中國CCC認證；須在清關前取得全新的PSQCA上市前審批。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or upon PSQCA / NEECA / PTA regulatory update
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verified flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Source must be official regulator, Pakistan standards body, or primary legal instrument.
